generated_from: real DB (atlas.db) + atlascode_coverage.json + plugin registry — no hand-typed entries
path_to_500: 237 canonical algorithms cannot alone reach 500 one-problem-per-algorithm (max ceiling ~237 that way). Reaching 500 requires a variant-expansion phase — multiple distinct problem CONTRACTS per algorithm (e.g. binary-search: exact/first-occurrence/last-occurrence/count/rotated/peak/answer-space-search = 7+ from one algorithm). That phase is NOT YET DESIGNED for any family beyond the single-contract-per-algorithm problems already seeded. Do not treat the `planned_from_uncovered_canonical_algorithms` entries below as sufficient to reach 500 — they cap out at 237 total (72 done + 165 planned) even if all are completed. See docs/atlascode-progress.md for the next real batch (DP: 8 deferred scalar-ambiguous algorithms; string: 13; greedy: 9; divide-and-conquer: 9) and PROGRESS_NOTES in this file's 'path_to_500' for the variant-phase plan.
